chosen_action.title: Upgrade primary-repo-flat discovery with a real runtime-sendable TIMEWELL contact path

why_this_action.summary: The short review window is still active until 2026-05-25T07:20:16, so another live outbound action would blur measurement. The highest-leverage same-run move was to improve the scheduled post-hold rerun by turning one fresh publisher target into a truthful runtime-sendable email lane instead of leaving the loop stuck on manual-only contact paths.
verification: Execution board showed no truthful do-now packet inside the active short review window and listed remaining non-runtime-sendable publisher targets as blockers.
Fresh primary-repo-flat discovery still contained TIMEWELL as an untouched publisher target relevant to Codeberg-first comparison/distribution work.
Public TIMEWELL contact evidence surfaced a real email path (timewell@timewell.jp), which is stronger than leaving the target trapped behind website-only/manual-only routing.

expected_outcome: When the short hold expires after 2026-05-25T07:20:16, the post-hold marketer rerun has a truthful fresh publisher target with a direct email route (TIMEWELL) instead of another manual-only dead end.

measurement_window.success_metric: Post-hold execution surfaces TIMEWELL as a direct-email-ready publisher target or otherwise uses the upgraded sendable path to create a real Codeberg-first outreach attempt.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If the post-hold rerun still cannot produce a truthful executable publisher lane after this repair, escalate immediately to another distribution architecture repair instead of logging another idle hold.
